underlying_goal: Fix ARM (Automatic Ripping Machine) failing to rip a DVD by setting a permanent MakeMKV beta key and resolving subsequent job-stuck issues
friction_detail: Claude couldn't run docker commands due to permissions and went down a rabbit hole modifying source files before user interrupted and exited.
brief_summary: User wanted to fix a MakeMKV key issue for DVD ripping; the config edit succeeded but subsequent stale-job debugging was unresolved when the user exited.
